# Image Pack — Birchline Insights (s-consulting-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic staff headshots
- `office/` — small consulting office / remote-work scenes
- `diagrams/` — project plans, scope diagrams, hour reconciliation visuals
- `social/` — boutique consulting templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: small, modern boutique consultancy.
- Palette: forest green + slate + cream.

## Safety
- No real brands.
- No readable client names in office imagery.
